arts.ttl: “Special” Liverpool star needs to “concentrate” more admits Arne Slot
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot has admitted that Trent Alexander-Arnold’s defensive flaws are due to concentration rather than his ability as the Dutch coach continues to try and bring the best out of the Reds star. Alexander-Arnold has started the current season in impressive fashion under his new boss and bagged his 83rd assist in a […] The post “Special” Liverpool star needs to “concentrate” more admits Arne Slot appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot explains how he is helping Trent Alexander-Arnold become a better defender
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot has praised Trent Alexander-Arnold's overall defensive ability but has revealed there is one particular thing he is working on with the right-back. "It's difficult for me to judge how it has been in the years before, but the only thing I know is that we are talking here about a player that won the Champions League and [Premier League] title," Slot said.

arts.ttl: Video: Stuart Pearce gives Julen Lopetegui sack verdict to West Ham owners

After a disastrous start to the 2024/25 campaign, it appears that supporters are already calling for the Spaniard’s head. arts.ttl: Liverpool 'willing' to reopen pursuit of Euro 2024 winner despite summer rejection
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly willing to reopen their pursuit of Real Sociedad midfielder Martin Zubimendi, who rejected the advances of the Reds during the summer window.

arts.ttl: What emotional Jurgen Klopp said about Liverpool win shows truth about new concept for Arne Slot
arts.sum: The Carabao Cup yielded plenty of memorable moments under Klopp and could offer Slot the perfect chance to kickstart his Anfield reign

arts.ttl: Under-fire Julen Lopetegui makes vow to West Ham fans ahead of Liverpool fixture
arts.sum: West Ham's new manager has come in for criticism after replacing David Moyes during the summer, winning just once in their opening five Premier League games and suffering a 3-0 loss to Chelsea at the weekend

arts.ttl: Arne Slot urges caution over Liverpool's brilliant early defensive record as he gives one reason why it's premature to heap praise on his side
arts.sum: Liverpool have taken 12 points from the first five games and the sole Premier League goal they have conceded was Hudson-Odoi's strike that enabled Forest to win at Anfield 11 days ago.
